---
title: "explore"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(jsonlite)

url <- "https://paddlestats.net/json/r/ADK90/2025/2007"
adkjson <- read_json(url, simplifyVector = TRUE)

adk <- adk$results |> as_tibble() |> 
  unnest_wider(rank) |> 
  unnest_longer(paddlers) |>
  unnest_wider(col = c(paddlers, elemVals))
```

```{r}
```
